## LibraryRuntime.ProducedMoldedBonBon class

Mutable wrapper for IProducedMoldedBonBon with undo/redo support. Provides molded bonbon-specific editing methods.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class ProducedMoldedBonBon extends ProducedConfectionBase<IProducedMoldedBonBonEntity> 
```
**Extends:** [ProducedConfectionBase](./ts-chocolate.libraryruntime.producedconfectionbase.md)<!-- -->&lt;[IProducedMoldedBonBonEntity](./ts-chocolate.entities.iproducedmoldedbonbonentity.md)<!-- -->&gt;
